# Zenith Bureau

> Done-for-you YouTube + Reddit + AI search visibility (AEO/GEO) agency for AI SaaS founders. When buyers ask ChatGPT what to buy, our clients are the answer.

Zenith Bureau builds the machine that makes AI cite you: YouTube channel production for your brand (4 to 6 videos a month), a managed Reddit presence with a real human behind every comment, machine-legible site work (schema, llms.txt, FAQ pages), and monthly AI citation tracking across ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google.

Founder: Arnav Adarsh
Contact: arnav@zenithbureau.com
Book a call: https://cal.com/arnav-adarsh-bkv1q6/arnav-zenith-calendar
